systemicBlockers.description: Backend features for convoy/checkpoint/merge/knowledge/digest/release-health are implemented and pass unit tests (commits 75f41c1e, 2364db05). However, the UI surfaces to access these features are NOT implemented in the Autopilot tab. This is the root cause blocking all 7 assertions - they require UI components that show: (1) convoy task lists with blocked/unblocked status, (2) checkpoint/resume buttons, (3) merge conflict indicators, (4) operator intervention controls, (5) knowledge/learner summary section, (6) digest/alerts section, (7) release-health monitoring section with rollback controls.

progressFromPriorRounds: Round 8 had 17 passed, 0 failed, 7 blocked. The 7 blocked assertions (035-041) were previously blocked by 'feature not yet implemented' (backend missing). This round confirms the backend IS now implemented (per commits 75f41c1e and 2364db05 with passing unit tests), but the BLOCKING ISSUE has shifted to missing UI surfaces in the Autopilot tab. The backend features work (proven by unit tests), but the Autopilot project page UI does not include the sections/components to access them: no convoy task list, no checkpoint/resume controls, no merge coordination UI, no operator intervention controls, no knowledge section, no digest section, no release-health section.
